summary: Demo Day Alpha: Final Tech & AV Check
description: All company founders on-site. Final slides and video checks. WiFi load test.

Autumn cohort pitching event. Five startups present: NovaTech AI (Marco Bianchi), GreenLoop (Luca Ferretti), MindBridge (Anna Kowalski), DataPulse (Simone Marchetti), UrbanFlow (Diana Rossi). 17:00-19:15 pitches + Q&A; 19:15-22:00 networking. 150+ investors, entrepreneurs, media expected.
